name: Pancakes by Good Enough to Eat
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together melted butter, buttermilk, and eggs.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine all the dry ingredients: flour, whole-wheat flour, wheat germ, rolled oats, cornmeal, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and pour in the liquid mixture. Mix together until just combined; do not overbeat.
3. Allow the batter to rest for 15-20 minutes.
4. Preheat a lightly buttered skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Ladle about half a cup of batter onto the skillet to form each pancake.
6. Cook until bubbles appear on the surface, then flip and cook until golden brown on the other side.
7. Keep the pancakes warm in an oven set to 250 degrees Fahrenheit with the bowl on top.
8. This recipe yields 10-12 large pancakes.
